title: Questions about monday dev? Ask them now!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community,

In just a few hours we are having an AMA on reddit all about monday dev. Our monday dev expert will be answering questions LIVE and I wanted to open it up to our forum community to also ask questions, post your questions now and tune in later today for Noam’s answer!

*If you don’t have a reddit account, feel free to post your monday dev questions below.

Get started with a dev - AMA nov211620×1620 108 KB
